stocks.impact_theory: Venture Global reported strong Q4 earnings with core profit nearly tripling due to higher LNG sales, coinciding with oil surge from US-Israel strikes on Iran disrupting Middle East supply. Economic implications: higher global energy demand boosts LNG exporters. Market psychology: fear-driven buying in energy amid geopolitical tensions. Historical parallels: 2022 Russia-Ukraine war LNG boom. Analogies: like a dam bursting flooding demand for alternatives; rocket fuel for LNG amid pipeline fears.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat Zacks estimate ($0.41 vs $0.35), shares +22% on volume; X sentiment positive on energy, web news highlights profit surge and LNG readiness as Qatar halts.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +20% gains on sustained oil >$80, target $14.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings guidance below expectations for 2026, oil price reversal if SPR release.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings + macro tailwind, high volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: US-Israel strikes on Iran caused oil to surge 8% to $73+, boosting integrated majors. Implications: higher refining margins, production profits. Psychology: risk premium on supply fears. Parallels: 1991 Gulf War oil spike +20%. Analogies: tailwind for supertanker profits; bonfire under energy stocks.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +4.5%, X posts highlight retail buying, news on oil jump to $80 potential; positive sentiment shift.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: De-escalation, US SPR release flooding supply.

stocks.justification: Clear macro driver but volatile geopolitics.

stocks.impact_theory: Geopolitical escalation increases defense spending, missile intercepts boost orders. Implications: backlog growth, govt contracts. Psychology: safe haven in uncertainty. Parallels: Post-9/11 defense rally. Analogies: sharpening swords before battle; insurance policy premium spike.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +4.9%, X buzz on re-orders for interceptors, news on war fears gripping markets.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +7% gains amid prolonged conflict.

stocks.justification: Historical precedent strong, X sentiment bullish.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surge raises jet fuel costs 20-30%, squeezing margins. Implications: higher fares, reduced travel. Psychology: fear of inflation/travel curbs. Parallels: 2014 oil spike airline rout. Analogies: pouring gasoline on cost fires; anchors dragging profit ships.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket -6%, X and news on airlines sliding, war fears.

stocks.justification: Direct oil exposure, but airlines resilient historically.

stocks.impact_theory: Risk-off rotation from tech amid broader market selloff on Iran news. Implications: delayed capex in uncertainty. Psychology: flight to value/energy. Parallels: 2022 rate hike tech drop. Analogies: tech as fair-weather friend fleeing storm; herd fleeing fireworks.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Nasdaq down, X options flow mixed but futures -1%, news on tech dive.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI demand overrides macro, quick recovery.

stocks.justification: Geopolitical secondary to AI narrative, sentiment volatile.
